382: 		final int LOW_COMMUNICATION_NODE_WEIGHT = 30;
383: 		final int TRUST_CACHE_TIME = 15 * 60;
384: 		return new CachedTrustProvider(new LowComTrustProvider(new EigenTrustPlusPlus(), LOW_COMMUNICATION_NODE_WEIGHT), TRUST_CACHE_TIME,
385: 				this.timeProvider());
386: 	}
387: 
388: 	@Bean
389: 	public NemConfigurationPolicy configurationPolicy() {
390: 		return new NisConfigurationPolicy();
391: 	}
392: 
393: 	@Bean
394: 	public ChainServices chainServices() {
395: 		return new DefaultChainServices(this.blockChainLastBlockLayer, this.httpConnectorPool());
396: 	}
397: 
398: 	@Bean
399: 	public CommonStarter commonStarter() {
400: 		return CommonStarter.INSTANCE;
401: 	}
402: 
403: 	@Bean
404: 	public ValidationState validationState() {
405: 		return NisCacheUtils.createValidationState(this.nisCache());
406: 	}
407: 
408: 	@Bean
409: 	public LocalHostDetector localHostDetector() {
410: 		return new LocalHostDetector(this.nisConfiguration().getAdditionalLocalIps());
411: 	}
412: 
413: 	@Bean
414: 	public NodeCompatibilityChecker nodeCompatibilityChecker() {
415: 		return new DefaultNodeCompatibilityChecker();
416: 	}
417: 
418: 	@Bean
419: 	public EnumSet<ObserverOption> observerOptions() {
420: 		final EnumSet<ObserverOption> observerOptions = EnumSet.noneOf(ObserverOption.class);
421: 		if (this.nisConfiguration().isFeatureSupported(NodeFeature.HISTORICAL_ACCOUNT_DATA)) {
422: 			observerOptions.add(ObserverOption.NoHistoricalDataPruning);
423: 		}
424: 
425: 		final BlockChainConfiguration blockChainConfiguration = this.nisConfiguration().getBlockChainConfiguration();
426: 		if (blockChainConfiguration.isBlockChainFeatureSupported(BlockChainFeature.PROOF_OF_STAKE)) {
427: 			observerOptions.add(ObserverOption.NoOutlinkObserver);
428: 		}
429: 
430: 		return observerOptions;
431: 	}
432: 
433: 	@Bean
434: 	public Function<Address, Collection<Address>> cosignatoryLookup() {
435: 		return a -> this.accountStateCache().findStateByAddress(a).getMultisigLinks().getCosignatories();
436: 	}
437: 
438: 	@Bean
439: 	public MosaicIdCache mosaicIdCache() {
440: 		return new SynchronizedMosaicIdCache(new DefaultMosaicIdCache());
441: 	}
442: }
